bird.name: Blue Mountain vireo
bird.summary: The Blue Mountain vireo (Vireo osburni) is a Near Threatened species of bird in the family Vireonidae, the vireos, greenlets, and shrike-ba…

relations.subject: Blue Mountain vireo
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits moist to humid montane forest on limestone but also upland woodlands, shade coffee plantations, and gardens
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Blue Mountain vireo
relations.evidence: However, it is found in the last three only when they are near the preferred montane forest. Sources differ on its elevation range
